name: Vitest integration flow on a dedicated test DB
outcome: A Vitest suite drives the full OAuth flow against a dedicated test database, asserting scope round-trip and refresh narrowing, plus focused repo tests.
scope: The end-to-end flow test, refresh-narrowing test, and repo tests, running on the slice-14 Vitest test-DB harness.
acceptance_criteria: Runs on the slice-14 harness: vitest against oauth_test via tests/.env.test, globalSetup migrate+seed, dynamic-table truncation between tests
The flow test (app.request) mints a jid, GETs authorize, captures the code, POSTs token with the PKCE verifier, and asserts access+refresh tokens AND granted scopes present
A refresh_token test asserts rotation and scope narrowing to a requested subset
Repo tests assert authCode/token persist write scope join rows and getByIdentifier loads them
steps: vitest — the runner, tests/.env.test, globalSetup (migrate+seed oauth_test) and between-test truncation are provided by the harness slice (14); this slice adds the flow + repo specs only
tests/oauth-flow.test.ts — full authorization_code + PKCE flow via app.request(), asserting tokens and scopes round-trip
tests/oauth-flow.test.ts — refresh_token grant: assert rotation and narrowing the requested scope to a subset
tests/repositories.test.ts — assert TokenRepository/AuthCodeRepository persist scope joins transactionally and getByIdentifier returns scopes
notes: Integration gate proving the scope-persistence fix, running on the slice-14 Vitest test-DB harness. Resilience negative paths (OAuthException mapping, bad secret, expired code, revoked refresh, CSRF reject) live in the dedicated resilience slice (issue 13), which reuses the same harness.
